citation: IRC §163(h)(3) + IRS Pub 936 — TCJA binding-contract grace period (BOTH flags True)
comment: Hand-calc: filing_status=single, has_grandfathered_debt=False, BUT binding contract signed before 2017-12-15 AND closed before 2018-04-01 (BOTH grace flags True) -> grace period applies -> grandfathered cap = $1,000,000. LOCKED DECISION (RESEARCH.md line 912): the grace period requires BOTH dates; a single origination_date can NOT capture this — predicate takes two booleans.
